---
title: "Metrics"
---

Methods, algorithms, indices, data sources, and terminology.
Not tied to any specific exploration.

## [Algorithms](./algorithms.qmd)

STL, spatially balanced PCA, exploratory PCA-score clustering, Theil–Sen, Mann–Kendall, and historical/retired algorithms such as STARS.

## [Indices](./indices.qmd)

ENSO, PDO, AMO, NAO, AO — large-scale climate oscillation indices.

## [Data](./data.qmd)

Datasets, variables, and measurement conventions.

## [Terms](./terms.qmd)

Definitions of recurring concepts
(global warming hiatus, regime shift, etc.).
